title: Help center
lead: If something feels unclear or inconsistent, start here. This page focuses on practical fixes and quick explanations.

seo.title: Help Center | LetterLab
seo.description: FAQs and quick help for LetterLab.

items.title: Getting started
Writing quality
Tone and style
Account and access
Privacy
How do I create my first draft?
body: Open the composer, add your notes or context, choose a tone if you like, and click Generate. Review the draft and edit as needed before sending or copying.

items.title: Can I use LetterLab without an account?
body: You need to sign in to use the drafting tools. Account creation is free; some features may require a plan. See Pricing for details.

items.title: Which email providers are supported?
body: LetterLab can integrate with Gmail and Outlook. You connect your account once; drafts can be sent or copied from the app.

items.title: How do I get a shorter draft?
body: Use the shorten or tighten option after generating, or add a note like "Keep it under 100 words." You can also edit the draft directly.

items.title: Why does the draft miss some of my points?
body: Include the most important points clearly in your notes. If something is missing, add it in a new line and regenerate or edit the draft manually.

items.title: Can I improve grammar only?
body: Yes. Use the proofreading or grammar check step if available, or paste the text and ask for "Grammar check only" in the notes.

items.title: What do formal, neutral, and friendly mean?
body: Formal uses more standard phrasing and avoids casual language. Neutral is balanced and professional. Friendly allows warmer, more conversational phrasing. You can mix by editing after generating.

items.title: How do I keep my greeting consistent?
body: Use the same greeting style in your notes (e.g., "Start with Dear Professor X") or pick a template that matches your usual style.

items.title: Can I save my own templates?
body: Template saving may be available on certain plans. Check the Templates section in the app or Documentation for the latest behavior.

items.title: I can't sign in. What should I do?
body: Confirm you are using the correct email and provider (Google or Microsoft). Clear cookies for this site and try again. If the problem continues, use the Contact form.

items.title: How do I disconnect my email account?
body: Go to Account or Profile, then Integrations or Connected accounts. Use the option to disconnect your email provider. You can reconnect later.

items.title: Where do I see my usage?
body: Usage and limits are shown in the Account or Profile area. The composer may also show a reminder when you are close to a limit.

items.title: Is my content used to train AI?
body: We do not use your content to train third-party models. Content is processed to serve your request. See the Privacy Policy for full details.

items.title: How long is my data kept?
body: Data retention is described in the Privacy Policy. In general, we retain data only as long as needed to provide the service and meet legal obligations.

items.title: Can I delete my account and data?
body: Yes. Account deletion is available in Account or Profile settings. After deletion, your data is removed according to our retention policy.
